properties.name: turf_terraces
properties.material: mown turf on restored treads (Scenario D surface)
properties.note: 45 tread bands in three terrain-fitted sections (east/bend/south)

properties.name: low_seat_edges
properties.material: timber or split-stone low seat edge, ≤1.5 ft exposed face
properties.note: riser face at each tread front; informal bench seating

properties.name: hardscape_stage
properties.material: low hardwood/composite deck over compacted base at event-floor grade
properties.note: no enclosing shell — lateral shoulders only; refit OPEN (Rule 9)

properties.name: accessible_paths
properties.material: stabilized aggregate / boardwalk ramps, ≤8.33% running slope
properties.note: switchback ADA ramps + landings, rows-9/10 cross-aisle, row-5 promenade hinge band

properties.name: event_floor
properties.material: stabilized turf (grass pavers at high-wear lines)
properties.note: orchestra floor between stage and the three row-1 bands

properties.name: bioretention_planting
properties.material: wet-tolerant meadow & bioretention mix (dry cell — no permanent water)
properties.note: ephemeral ponding only, after large storms

properties.name: vegetated_swales
properties.material: grassed interception swales falling to the NE pour point

properties.name: existing_vegetation
properties.material: existing canopy + understory, selectively trimmed in view corridor

properties.name: existing_slope_grass
properties.material: existing slope grasses, unmown except blanket maintenance
